name: Fred W. Friendly
abstract: Fred W. Friendly (born Ferdinand Friendly Wachenheimer, October 30, 1915 – March 3, 1998) was a president of CBS News and the creator, along with Edward R.

about_quotes.speaker: Woody Herman
about_quotes.evidence: I read, like, editorials by Fred Friendly and a million other people who are very well informed on television
